TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Charles_Bradley, title = Charles_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charles_Bradley} }

S.FORM: Charles Bradley kawas te 1959, byacing te 5 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 98 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1981 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Charles Bradley kawas te 1959, byacing te 5 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 98 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1981 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ βra*lej kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa marjlan*, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
